notes: Resource definition at lines 21245-21270 (path, Available version 51.0, HTTP method GET, Requires Chatter: No, Response body = "Member Benefits"). Response schema "Member Benefits" at lines 30479-30525 with nested "Member Benefit" output at 30527-30557. CAVEAT: the doc's JSON example (lines 30485-30510) is malformed in the extracted PDF text, it wraps the array under a "result" key and uses a single object brace where two array elements are expected, and uses smart/curly quotes around the "description" field. The authoritative property table (line 30520-30523) states the top-level property is "memberBenefits" of type "Member Benefit Output[]" (array). I normalized the fixture to that documented shape (memberBenefits: [...]) using the two example benefit objects verbatim and fixed the smart quotes to standard JSON. memberId is a path placeholder (e.g. 0lM0000Abthl24242af per resource example at line 21251); no request body (GET). No error/empty example is shown in the doc, so only a success fixture is provided. The "description" field is Available Version 58.0 (newer than the 51.0 resource baseline) per line 30548, included since it appears in the documented example.
